'''Sergio Aragonés''' is a cartoonist and writer best known for his contributions to [[Wikipedia:Mad Magazine|''Mad Magazine'']] and creator of the comic book [[Wikipedia:Groo the Wanderer|''Groo the Wanderer'']].

His ''[[Star Wars]]''–themed comics include ''[[Sergio Aragonés Stomps Star Wars]]'', "[[Spare Parts (comic story)|Spare Parts]]," and "[[Junkheap Hero]]." He also illustrated the [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']].

Years before his involvement in ''Star Wars'', Aragonés had been honored by author [[Roy Thomas]] who based the character of [[Serji-X Arrogantus]] on him.<ref name="db">{{DB|character|serjixarrogantus|Arrogantus, Serji-X}}</ref>
